meta.title: Max & Victoria
meta.description: We're getting married! Join us on September 13, 2026.

home.subtitle: We're Getting Married!
home.hopeMakeIt: We hope you can make it!

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.quoteHim: I saw her across the room and I couldn't look away.
ourStory.quoteHer: We caught eye contact and I was mesmerized by that smile.
ourStory.narrative: We met unexpectedly and discovered we had everything in common. After years of adventures together, we're ready to make it official.

registry.title: Registry
registry.message: Many of you are traveling to celebrate with us, so your presence means the world to us and is all we ask for.
registry.giftNote: For those who have been asking, we've set up a small registry and honeymoon fund.

rsvp.title: RSVP
rsvp.intro: We look forward to seeing you! Fill out the form below.
rsvp.name: Full Name
rsvp.messagePlaceholder: Any dietary restrictions, song requests, or a note for the couple...
rsvp.successMessage: Your RSVP has been received. We can't wait to celebrate with you!
rsvp.errorMessage: Please try again or email us directly.

travelStay.title: Travel & Stay
travelStay.gettingThereText: Flagstaff is located in northern Arizona, easily accessible by car or plane.
travelStay.whereToStayText: We recommend staying at the following boutique hotel close to the venue.
travelStay.hotelDescription: A charming boutique hotel with vineyard views
travelStay.thingsToDoText: Flagstaff is a beautiful mountain town with plenty to explore before and after the wedding.
